title: AI Lucky Block
description: Custom AI GPT Powered Lucky Blocks bring AI-inspired surprises, unique loot, random events, and exciting challenges, making every break unpredictable.
body:
**AI GPT Lucky Blocks brings unpredictable fun and adventure to your Minecraft world! When broken, these mysterious blocks can drop anything—from valuable treasures to dangerous surprises. It’s all about luck!**

🔍 How to Find Lucky Blocks:

🌍 Generation: AI GPT Lucky Blocks naturally generate in the Overworld.

⛏️ Exploration: Search plains, forests, and caves for hidden blocks.

🎁 Breaking Them: Just mine or break one, and you’ll instantly get random loot.

![Thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4aadde41c7bd5cb332bdd19b4fbab3f9971e5223.png)


✨ Features:

🛡️ Custom Armors & Weapons – Special gear with unique powers.

🔥**FlamerThrower** - (New)

![Flame Thrower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c31a1e24348c0c5133d95e079dd70b2579186f0d.png)

🔨**Gravity Hammer** - (New)

![Gravity Hammer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f7a68ae507a6a59f91b47ada54f9bc43b23e168.png)

📱**Device** - (New GUI)

![GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d69cb3e0d58af8b17cacacb2dae609843f1befcb.png)

Insert Diamond in The Slot to Use This Button.

**Rubidium Armor** (New) - 

![Rubidium Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/800f49a04edf8fc365a37a27adb808d755394845.png)

**NFT Coins** (New) -

![NFT Coins](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d8e73fe5c6962ba75290fb79f88dbfb8028b7f9.png)




🎲 New Loot Tables – Every break gives random drops, from diamonds to mobs.
💥 Exciting Surprises – Traps, explosions, or rare rewards!

🧭 Exploration Fun – Each Lucky Block is full of mystery.
![Custom Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2807119ab2db6a38254b4b115a36cd8caef7c885.png)
📱Device- You Can Collect This From Lucky Blocks Its Very Rare.
![device](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef53583ee4e9efe74db0c40c86e9ce84b3f3f797.png)
